title: Delhi Govt Issues Heatwave Alert; Departments Directed to Restrict Outdoor Workers During Peak Afternoon Hours
description: CM Rekha Gupta has instructed officials to ensure that outdoor workers are not exposed to intense sunlight between 1 PM and 4 PM during severe heatwave conditions. Departments have been asked to revise work schedules, provide adequate shade, drinking water, caps to prevent heat-related illnesses.
